seo.title: Aranmanai Aranmanai Song Lyrics Aranmanai 2
seo.description: Full Aranmanai Aranmanai songs lyrics, sharable lyrics snippets, Music: Hip Hop Tamizha, Singer(s): Hip Hop Tamizha, Kharesma Ravichandran.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song Aranmanai Aranmanai captures the festive and lively spirit associated with celebrations and gatherings.

What is the context of this song in the movie?

In Aranmanai 2, this song is played during a lively celebration, enhancing the festive atmosphere of the film.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song features the talented voices of Hip Hop Tamizha and Kharesma Ravichandran.

When was the song released?

Aranmanai Aranmanai was released on January 29, 2016.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Aranmanai Aranmanai from Aranmanai 2 is a lively and energetic track that perfectly encapsulates the joy of celebrations. With its catchy beats and engaging lyrics, it invites listeners to join in the fun and dance. The collaboration between Hip Hop Tamizha and Kharesma Ravichandran brings a fresh vibe that resonates with the festive theme of the movie. This song evokes feelings of happiness and excitement, making it a perfect addition to any party playlist.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Aranmanai Aranmanai is a vibrant and energetic track that showcases the unique collaboration between Hip Hop Tamizha and Kharesma Ravichandran. This song is sure to get you on your feet with its catchy beats and lively lyrics. Dive into the festive spirit with this dance number from Aranmanai 2!
stanzaMeanings: Do you know the history of this mansion?
Come close, come near, I will open my doors for you, come close, come near, I am waiting with my heart for you.
This mansion, this mansion, will fall with life, you, this mansion, will spread and roam, I, this mansion, if you come, cannot go back, outside, it is a path, a path, a path.
